title: Chilled water pump lead/lag times
summary: Chilled water pump starts 5 minutes before oil pump, stops 5 minutes after main motor shutdown
evidence_quote: 冷冻水泵相对于油泵提前5分钟启动...冷冻水泵相对于主电机延时 5分钟关闭
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Condenser water pump timing
summary: Condenser water pump starts 30 seconds after chilled water pump, stops 5 minutes after main motor
evidence_quote: 冷却水泵延时冷冻水泵30秒启动...冷却水泵相对于主电机延时5分钟关闭
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Leak test pressure and criteria
summary: Leak test: pressurize to 1150±50 kPa, pressure drop must not exceed 11.5 kPa in 24 hours
evidence_quote: 向机内充入1150±50kPa(表压) 左右的氮气...24h后压力降不超过11.5kPa为合格
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk

title: Vacuum test criteria
summary: Vacuum test: evacuate to below 1 kPa absolute, pressure rise must not exceed 0.4 kPa in 24 hours
evidence_quote: 将机内抽至绝对压力为 1kPa（7.5mmHg）以下的真空...若机内压力的回升超过 0.4 kPa (3mmHg),则应重新进行气密试验
rejection_reason: evidence_quote not found in any chunk
